description_long: This is a full-sized axe featuring a long, slightly curved wooden handle with a natural wood grain finish. The handle is ergonomically shaped, widening at the end for a secure grip and curving gently for better leverage. The axe head is robust and metallic, painted red with a silver cutting edge, and features a broad, wedge-shaped blade suitable for chopping. The poll (back) of the axe head is flat, allowing for secondary use as a hammering surface. The blade is securely mounted to the handle, with the mounting area reinforced and flush with the wood. The overall design is utilitarian, typical of axes used for chopping wood or emergency urban applications.
description: A full-sized axe with a curved wooden handle and a red, wedge-shaped metal blade with a silver edge. The handle is ergonomic and the blade is robust, suitable for chopping or emergency use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the red axe head with a silver edge.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the broad, wedge-shaped blade and the curvature of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's ergonomic curve and the flat poll of the axe head.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the poll of the axe head and the handle's end flare.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with ergonomic grip, flared end, oval cross-section, natural finish.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad wedge-shaped blade, silver cutting edge, red painted body, flat poll, no beard.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting, blade fitted and secured into the wooden handle.
